caption: The video features a man sitting at a desk in what appears to be a radio or podcast studio. He is wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" written on it, a white cap, and headphones. The man is engaged in conversation, speaking into a microphone placed in front of him. The background includes a banner with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and stars, as well as a sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "BOSS TALK 101." There are also some electronic devices and a cup on the desk. The setting suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere, likely for a talk show or podcast recording.
